AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION OF PLAINTIFF PATRICK SCAHILL FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST LAWRENCE CHOY PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AGAINST DEFENDANT LAWRENCE CHOY (TRANSACTION ID # 63194371) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCAHILL, PATRICK

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF PATRICK SCAHILL'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST LAWRENCE CHOY PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE THE ORDER SETTING ASIDE THE DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PARTIES TO FILE A STIPULATION FOR THE COURT TO RETAIN JURISDICTION PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 PRIOR TO ANY DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES IS DENIED. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PROVIDES FOR COSTS AND FEES ASSOCIATED WITH COLLECTION OF THE MONIES DUE. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PROVIDES EACH PARTY WILL BEAR HIS/HER OWN COSTS, EXPENSES, AND ATTORNEYS' FEES . . . INCURRED IN, OR ARISING OUT OF, OR IN ANY WAY CONNECTED WITH THE CIRCUMSTANCES AND DISPUTES WHICH ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS AGREEMENT. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. (COUNSEL SUBMITS PROPOSED ORDER, PENDING) - JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Patrick Scahill For Entry Of Judgment Against Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; Request For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Lawrence Choy
Off Calendar May-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Laura Strasso of the law offices of Hooshmand Law Group (415-318-5709) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PATRICK SCAHILL's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Against Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 is GRANTED. Plaintiff to prepare the Order setting aside the Dismissal. Plaintiff to prepare Order for Entry of Judgment. Parties to file a stipulation for the Court to retain jurisdiction pursuant to CCP 664.6 prior to any dismissal.

Plaintiff's request for Attorneys fees is DENIED. Stipulation for Entry of Judgment provides for costs and fees associated with collection of the monies due. The Settlement Agreement provides each party will bear his/her own costs, expenses, and attorneys' fees . . . incurred in, or arising out of, or in any way connected with the circumstances and disputes which are the subject of this agreement. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312. (Counsel submits proposed order, pending)

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Patrick Scahill For Entry Of Judgment Against Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; Request For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Lawrence Choy
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Continued To May-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark Hooshmand, 415.318.5709 of Hooshmand Law Group for Plaintiff/Moving party Patrick Scahill.
No other appearance.

Discussed. Mr. Hooshmand informs the Court that he has a signed stipulation to set aside the dismissals which were submitted for the Courts review. The issue of jurisdiction was raised.

The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF PATRICK SCAHILL Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Patrick Scahill For Entry Of Judgment Against Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; Request For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Lawrence Choy is continued to May 3, 2019. Plaintiff's counsel to give notice. Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
